scope: K group round 2 pre-prediction factual data refresh only; no prediction and no betting advice.
factor_inputs_reason: Round 2 fixtures, venues, post-round-1 local player_state/roster summaries and public pre-match context are refreshed. Official lineups, final official injury bulletins, official China lottery odds, same-source live market snapshot and official hourly stadium weather remain unavailable.

rest_days.portugal: Round 1 was on 2026-06-17 at Houston Stadium vs DR Congo. Approx 5 full rest days and no city change.
rest_days.uzbekistan: Round 1 was on 2026-06-17 in Mexico City vs Colombia. Approx 5 full rest days and a Mexico City to Houston transfer.

travel.portugal: Same-city Houston sequence; lowest travel load. Training-base commute not verified.
travel.uzbekistan: Mexico City to Houston international transfer, approx 1200 km class estimate.

facts: Houston regional reporting indicates a building heat dome, low-to-mid 90s F temperatures and high humidity with possible triple-digit heat index.
NRG/Houston Stadium has a closable roof, so in-stadium weather delay risk is lower than an open-air venue; outdoor transit, fan events and training exposure still carry heat/humidity risk.
Official hourly stadium forecast was not retrieved.

odds_snapshot_status.note: No official China lottery or same-source live 1X2/handicap/totals snapshot retrieved; no betting advice.

source_log.source: 2026 FIFA World Cup Group K schedule page

rest_days.colombia: Round 1 was on 2026-06-17 in Mexico City vs Uzbekistan. Approx 5 full rest days and a short transfer to Guadalajara.
rest_days.dr_congo: Round 1 was on 2026-06-17 in Houston vs Portugal. Approx 5 full rest days and a Houston to Guadalajara transfer.

travel.colombia: Mexico City to Guadalajara, approx 460 km class estimate.
travel.dr_congo: Houston to Guadalajara cross-border transfer, approx 1300 km class estimate.

facts: Estadio Akron / Guadalajara is in a high-altitude city context, approx 1500 m class; this may affect feel and recovery.
Official hourly stadium forecast was not retrieved.

odds_snapshot_status.note: No official China lottery or same-source live 1X2/handicap/totals snapshot retrieved; no betting advice.

key_player_state: Joao Neves: round-1 goal, positive status input.
Pedro Neto: round-1 assist, wide output available.
Cristiano Ronaldo: 90 minutes in round 1 with no goal or assist; role and load remain pre-match watch points.
Bruno Fernandes, Vitinha and Joao Cancelo: main build-up/progression inputs remain usable.
portugal.cards_suspension: Round-1 yellows: Bernardo Silva, Nelson Semedo, Tomas Araujo. No confirmed red card or suspension found.
portugal.injury_minutes_risk: Ruben Dias injury wording is conflicting in local review. Ronaldo starting role and Leao/Conceicao rotation are public pre-match watch points.

key_player_state: Yoane Wissa: round-1 goal, transition and box-finishing signal available.
Arthur Masuaku: round-1 assist, left-side crossing input available.
Axel Tuanzebe, Samuel Moutoussamy and Aaron Wan-Bissaka: defensive/duel inputs available.
dr_congo.cards_suspension: Round-1 yellow: Chancel Mbemba. No confirmed red card or suspension found.
dr_congo.injury_minutes_risk: Several starters were substituted after 70 minutes in round 1; Houston to Guadalajara travel recovery needs pre-match recheck.

key_player_state: Abbosbek Fayzullaev: round-1 goal, positive attacking input.
Eldor Shomurodov: round-1 assist, front-line link and transition input available.

uzbekistan.injury_minutes_risk: Round-1 review remains partial due missing complete official card table and same-source player ratings. Usable for model input but needs red-team caution.

key_player_state: Luis Diaz: round-1 goal, left-side finishing and ball-carrying input up.
Daniel Munoz: round-1 goal, right-side forward-run input up.
Jaminton Campaz: substitute goal, bench scoring input up.

colombia.cards_suspension: Round-1 yellow: Johan Mojica. No confirmed red card or suspension found.

group_state_after_round1.source: 2026 FIFA World Cup Group K page, FIFA-referenced schedule/standings
group_state_after_round1.fair_play_notes: Group K schedule/standings source lists DR Congo -1, Portugal -3, Uzbekistan -1, Colombia -1 after matchday 1. Local review notes Uzbekistan complete official card table still needs recheck.

model_input_summary.baseline_strength: Portugal and Colombia remain higher baseline teams; DR Congo draw against Portugal improves resistance signal; Uzbekistan debut loss leaves defensive risk but keeps Fayzullaev/Shomurodov attacking path.
model_input_summary.recent_form: Colombia strongest first-round result; Portugal and DR Congo drew; Uzbekistan lost 1-3 but generated a verified scoring event.
model_input_summary.attack_signals: Portugal: Joao Neves/Neto chain; Colombia: Luis Diaz/Munoz/Campaz; DR Congo: Wissa/Masuaku cross path; Uzbekistan: Fayzullaev/Shomurodov.
model_input_summary.defense_signals: Portugal conceded equalizer; DR Congo held Portugal but must travel; Uzbekistan conceded 3; Colombia conceded once but finished strongly.
model_input_summary.player_state: All four teams have 26-player files; Uzbekistan player_state_update_status remains partial due source gaps.
model_input_summary.injury_minutes_risk: Ruben Dias conflict, Ronaldo role/minutes debate, Colombia and Portugal attacking-player load, DR Congo/Uzbekistan travel recovery.
model_input_summary.schedule_environment: Houston heat/humidity for Portugal-Uzbekistan; Guadalajara altitude/travel context for Colombia-DR Congo. Official hourly weather missing.
